title: Accordion
description: A vertically stacked list of items that can be expanded or collapsed to reveal hidden content.

title: Floating Action Button
description: A circular button that floats above the interface, used for primary or quick actions.

title: Modal Dialog
description: A pop-up window that overlays the main content to capture user attention for critical tasks or messages.

title: Tooltip
description: A small, informative text box that appears when hovering or focusing on an element to provide extra context.
